Risiko Pasar Market Risk 1) Risiko nilai tukar mata uang asing 1) Foreign exchange risk Mata uang pelaporan Grup adalah The Group’s reporting currency is the rupiah. Grup dapat menghadapi risiko rupiah. The Group faces foreign currency mata uang asing karena beberapa risk as the costs of certain sales are penjualan utamanya dalam mata uang denominated in foreign currencies, such asing yaitu menggunakan dolar as U.S. dollar. To the extent that the sales Amerika Serikat, Apabila penjualan of the Group are denominated in Grup di dalam mata uang selain rupiah, currencies other than the rupiah, and are dan tidak seimbang dalam hal not evenly matched in terms of kuantitas/jumlah dan/atau pemilihan quantity/volume and/or timing, the Group waktu, Grup harus menghadapi risiko has exposure to foreign currency risk. mata uang asing. Grup tidak mempunyai kebijakan The Group does not have any formal lindung nilai yang formal untuk laju hedging policy for foreign exchange pertukaran mata uang asing. exposure. 2) Risiko harga 2) Price risk Operasi Grup terekspos terhadap risiko The Group’s operations are exposed to pasar terkait dengan fluktuasi harga dari market risks related to the price volatility harga komoditas yang diperdagangkan of commodity prices traded on world coal di pasar batubara dunia. Namun markets. However, the Group’s financial demikian, aset dan liabilitas keuangan assets and liabilities are not significantly Grup tidak terekspos secara signifikan exposed to the price volatility of world terhadap fluktuasi harga batubara dunia coal markets because the settlement of karena penyelesaian aset dan liabilitas financial assets and liabilities is based on keuangan berdasarkan harga yang the prices stipulated in the coal sales and tercantum dalam kontrak jual beli purchase agreements which will be batubara yang ditentukan pada saat determined at the time of delivery. pengiriman. 85 The original consolidated financial statements included herein are in the Indonesian language.
